name: YES BANK MARQUEE Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: 40,000 YES Rewardz points credited on fee realization in first year
20,000 YES Rewardz points credited on renewal fee realization
Renewal fee waiver on spending Rs 10,00,000 in a card anniversary year
additionalBenefits: Economic Times Prime subscription as joining benefit
Unlimited international lounge access for primary and add-on cardmembers
Domestic lounge access up to 6 visits per quarter for primary and add-on cardmembers, subject to spend threshold
Buy one get one movie benefit on BookMyShow with monthly cap
Purchase protection cover on eligible electronics
Green fee waiver and golf lessons at select golf courses
YES Rewardz point value up to Rs 0.25 per point

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria

name: YES Bank Kiwi Credit Card
exclusions: enhanced cashback depends on Kiwi app and membership structure
rewards structure differs across eligible UPI and non-UPI transaction types
additionalBenefits: Zero joining fee and zero annual fee
1.5% cashback on UPI scan and pay through Kiwi
0.5% cashback on online payments through Kiwi
2 YES Bank Rewards points for every Rs 200 non-UPI spends
1% fuel surcharge waiver
Card is distributed through the Kiwi app with YES Bank as issuing partner

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK and Kiwi approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK and Kiwi approval criteria
